channel.title: Connections on Cyborg Support
channel.description: Recent content in Connections on Cyborg Support

item.title: Domain — cyborg.support
item.description:
Registrar

Dreamhost — panel.dreamhost.com

DNS Records

Record Type Value Notes
cyborg.support A 185.199.108.153 GitHub Pages
cyborg.support A 185.199.109.153 GitHub Pages
cyborg.support A 185.199.110.153 GitHub Pages
cyborg.support A 185.199.111.153 GitHub Pages
cyborg.support A 69.163.178.104 Old host (not_editable — managed by Dreamhost)
www.cyborg.support A 69.163.178.104 Old host (not_editable — CNAME blocked)
ftp.cyborg.support A 69.163.178.104 Dreamhost managed
ssh.cyborg.support A 69.163.178.104 Dreamhost managed

GitHub Pages

Repo: cyborg-support/cyborg-support.github.io

Custom domain target: cyborg.support

Known Issues

  • www.cyborg.support still points to old host — Dreamhost API returns not_editable, must be changed via panel manually
  • Old cyborg.support A record 69.163.178.104 also not_editable via API

item.title: Session — 2026-04-20
item.description:
O que foi feito

GitHub

  • Criado org cyborg-support em github.com/cyborg-support
  • Criado repo público cyborg-support/cyborg-support.github.io

Hugo Site

  • Site inicializado em /Users/nonlinear/Documents/cyborg support/
  • hugo.toml configurado com baseURL = https://cyborg.support/ e publishDir = docs
  • Primeiro build gerado em docs/
  • Repo linkado via git com token da conta nonlinear embebido no remote URL
  • Push inicial feito para main

DNS — cyborg.support (Dreamhost)

  • Removidos A records antigos (65.108.210.53, AAAA 2a01:4f9:c012:8fa6::1)
  • Adicionados 4 A records do GitHub Pages:
    • 185.199.108.153
    • 185.199.109.153
    • 185.199.110.153
    • 185.199.111.153
  • www e um A record antigo (69.163.178.104) marcados como not_editable pela API — remover manualmente no painel Dreamhost

Backstage / Tasks

  • T002 Create repo — done
  • T005 Create .code-workspace — done
  • T004 GitHub Actions — cancelled (deploy feito via publish-hugo.prompt.md)
  • T006 CNAME — in progress (DNS parcial, www pendente)
  • T007 Reveal.js layout — todo
  • T008 Events plugin — todo

Env / Credenciais

  • DREAMHOST_KEY salvo em ~/.zshrc
  • Remote URL do repo com token GITHUB_TOKEN_NONLINEAR embebido

Pendente

  1. Remover www.cyborg.support A record antigo via painel Dreamhost → adicionar CNAME para cyborg-support.github.io
  2. Configurar GitHub Pages no repo: branch main / folder /docs + custom domain cyborg.support
  3. Escolher tema Hugo (T003)
  4. Implementar Reveal.js layout (T007)
  5. Implementar events archetype (T008)
